title: WVS social trust score direction
description: Forecast whether a country's World Values Survey social trust score will be higher at a later survey year than at the as_of survey year.
question_template: As of {as_of_year}, will {target}'s WVS social trust score (most people can be trusted) be higher in {resolution_year} than in {as_of_year}?
limitations: WVS is wave-based, not annual. Metric rows use survey year (e.g. wave 7 ≈ 2017 for USA). Only use when year mapping is explicit in processed metrics notes (wvs_wave). Sparse cross-country coverage; do not treat as annual time series.
